approved_command_preview:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_evidence_gaps_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$schemaSummary = Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema\schema.summary.json'
$coverage = Join-Path $export.FullName 'metadata\metadata_coverage.json'
$gaps = @()
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-METADATA-AUTOMATIONS'; gap='Airtable automations were not exported by the current tool'; impact='Automation-level enforcement cannot be confirmed from schema export alone'; recommended_followup='Manual Airtable review or future API-supported exporter enhancement' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-METADATA-INTERFACES'; gap='Airtable interfaces were not exported by the current tool'; impact='Interface-specific views or controls are outside current evidence'; recommended_followup='Manual Airtable interface review if relevant' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-METADATA-EXTENSIONS'; gap='Extensions/apps and scripting extension code were not exported by the current tool'; impact='Extension-driven behavior is not covered by current discovery evidence'; recommended_followup='Manual review only if extensions exist or matter to cleanup decisions' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-RECORD-SAMPLES'; gap='Record-content evidence in this branch is bounded unless full export is separately approved'; impact='Discovery is enough for schema mapping but not full duplicate/content cleanup'; recommended_followup='Use full-record export later when content cleanup workstream requires it' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-ARTIFACT-LOCAL-INSPECTION'; gap='ChatGPT could verify workflow reports but could not directly unpack downloaded artifacts in this chat'; impact='Artifact file names and generation are report-verified, but local artifact contents were not independently opened in-chat'; recommended_followup='Use workflow reports as current evidence; download artifact if deeper inspection is needed before destructive work' }
$gaps | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'discovery_evidence_gaps.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 discovery evidence gaps','','Generated by chatgpt-exec. No Airtable records were modified by this report generation.','','| gap id | gap | impact | follow-up |','|---|---|---|---|') + ($gaps | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.gap_id + ' | ' + $_.gap + ' | ' + $_.impact + ' | ' + $_.recommended_followup + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'discovery_evidence_gaps.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 evidence gaps report at ' + $outDir)
command:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_evidence_gaps_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$schemaSummary = Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema\schema.summary.json'
$coverage = Join-Path $export.FullName 'metadata\metadata_coverage.json'
$gaps = @()
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-METADATA-AUTOMATIONS'; gap='Airtable automations were not exported by the current tool'; impact='Automation-level enforcement cannot be confirmed from schema export alone'; recommended_followup='Manual Airtable review or future API-supported exporter enhancement' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-METADATA-INTERFACES'; gap='Airtable interfaces were not exported by the current tool'; impact='Interface-specific views or controls are outside current evidence'; recommended_followup='Manual Airtable interface review if relevant' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-METADATA-EXTENSIONS'; gap='Extensions/apps and scripting extension code were not exported by the current tool'; impact='Extension-driven behavior is not covered by current discovery evidence'; recommended_followup='Manual review only if extensions exist or matter to cleanup decisions' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-RECORD-SAMPLES'; gap='Record-content evidence in this branch is bounded unless full export is separately approved'; impact='Discovery is enough for schema mapping but not full duplicate/content cleanup'; recommended_followup='Use full-record export later when content cleanup workstream requires it' }
$gaps += [pscustomobject]@{ gap_id='GAP-WBS01-ARTIFACT-LOCAL-INSPECTION'; gap='ChatGPT could verify workflow reports but could not directly unpack downloaded artifacts in this chat'; impact='Artifact file names and generation are report-verified, but local artifact contents were not independently opened in-chat'; recommended_followup='Use workflow reports as current evidence; download artifact if deeper inspection is needed before destructive work' }
$gaps | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'discovery_evidence_gaps.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 discovery evidence gaps','','Generated by chatgpt-exec. No Airtable records were modified by this report generation.','','| gap id | gap | impact | follow-up |','|---|---|---|---|') + ($gaps | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.gap_id + ' | ' + $_.gap + ' | ' + $_.impact + ' | ' + $_.recommended_followup + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'discovery_evidence_gaps.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 evidence gaps report at ' + $outDir)
